basic_info.title: EarthBound
basic_info.review: A masterpiece of storytelling and humor that redefined the JRPG genre with its modern setting and quirky charm.

play_today.details: The most accessible official version with Nintendo's emulation. Includes the Player's Guide and runs smoothly on modern hardware.

recommended_patches.name: Mother 2: Perfect Edition
recommended_patches.description: The most complete re-localization patch. Uncensored script with refined dialogue closer to the original Japanese intent.

recommended_patches.name: EarthBound Consistency Patch
recommended_patches.description: Makes EarthBound more consistent with EarthBound Beginnings and Mother 3 in terms of terminology and style.

optimal_settings: CRT filter enabled for authentic look

play_today.details: Portable version with fan translation for Mother 1. Mother 2 only has menu translations but offers portability.

recommended_patches.name: Mother 1+2 Fan Translation
recommended_patches.description: Complete English translation for Mother 1 by Tomato and Jeffman. Mother 2 has menu translations only.

play_today.details: Original cartridge experience. Can be enhanced with unofficial patches for improved translation and bug fixes.

recommended_patches.name: Mother 2: Perfect Edition
recommended_patches.description: Uncensored re-localization with refined script and removed censorship from original release.

recommended_patches.name: MaternalBound Patch
recommended_patches.description: Earlier translation hack that Perfect Edition builds upon. Good alternative if you prefer its style.

play_today.details: Modern PC version with emulators offering flexibility and quality-of-life features.

recommended_patches.name: Mother 2: Perfect Edition
recommended_patches.description: Best translation patch for PC play. Uncensored and refined.

recommended_patches.name: EarthBound Ultimate Mod
recommended_patches.description: Fan-made remake with quality-of-life features including Red Text boxes option.

optimal_settings: SNES core set to accurate mode

play_today.details: The definitive modern experience via Nintendo Switch Online. Features native rewind functionality, save states, and cloud saves for seamless play. Includes the original SNES version with full English localization. While graphics remain 4:3, the convenience of modern hardware and the ability to pause/rewind makes it the most accessible version for new players.

description.synopsis: Ness, a young boy with psychic powers, leaves his home in Onett to save the world from the alien Giygas. Joined by friends Paula, Jeff, and Poo, he travels across a modernized version of the United States, battling cultists, monsters, and strange phenomena. The journey is filled with humor, heart, and the struggle to maintain hope in a chaotic world.
key_features: Modern setting with contemporary items (e.g., baseball bats, slingshots)
Non-linear exploration of a modernized world map
Dynamic battle music that changes based on enemy types
Use of everyday objects as weapons and healing items
legacy_and_impact: EarthBound is widely regarded as a cult classic that influenced countless RPGs with its modern setting and unique humor. Its initial commercial failure in the West was eventually overshadowed by a passionate fanbase that kept the series alive, leading to re-releases and a dedicated following decades later.
